title: aquilegia vulgaris var. pyrenaica
intro: Aquilegia vulgaris var. pyrenaica, also known as Pyrenean columbine, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Pyrenees Mountains in Europe. The plant contains compounds with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential medicinal plant. The health benefits of Pyrenean columbine include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
